articles.title: Avoid 'reactive' police reforms after Nowak murder, senior black officer warns
articles.description: The head of the National Black Police Association says proposed changes to racism guidance are "not well thought-out".

articles.title: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder
articles.description: X-owner Musk has posted several times on the site criticising the police treatment of Henry Nowak.

articles.title: New NHS drug offers ovarian cancer patients more time and better quality of life
articles.description: Women taking the drug, which is kinder on the body, tell the BBC it has given them their lives back.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
articles.description: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.
